subject: fix(pwa): resolve bottom sheet overlap and enable debug in all envs
body:
InstallPrompt was rendered in root _layout.tsx alongside BottomSheet,
both competing for the same z-index space on web, causing a visual
double-sheet. Moved InstallPrompt into the home screen with explicit
z-index layering above the BottomSheet.

Also enabled debug system in all environments (not just __DEV__) for
alpha-phase diagnostics, and softened the ALPHA header badge styling.

Tags: pwa, ui, debug, bottom-sheet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-fixes
Semver: patch
